PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-18-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 7, 1995 and codicil dated January 30, 2000 are admitted to probate. Bruce Moorad is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court.

Status on close of estate is set for March 2, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of a report of status of administration is filed at least 1 week prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-21-2020 Continued To Nov-18-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
